word: G5033 - τάχιστα - táchista - takh'-is-tah - + with all speed

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τάχιστα

- Transliteration: Tachista

- Phonetic: takh'-is-tah

- Definition:

1. very quickly

- Origin: neuter plural of the superlative of G5036 (as adverb)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter plural of the superlative of G5036 (as adverb); most quickly that is (with G5613 prefixed) as soon as possible: - + with all speed.
